shipped.description: Git-native prompt regression testing with judge calibration for LLM CI/CD pipelines
shipped.pypi_status: READY_TO_PUBLISH — needs PyPI account + OIDC trusted publishing setup
shipped.key_differentiator: Judge calibration — verifies LLM judge agrees with humans before trusting it as a CI gate. No other tool has this as a pip-installable primitive.
shipped.next_step: Push to GitHub repo buildworld-ai/prompt-lock, publish to PyPI, launch HN + Dev.to + r/LocalLLaMA

shipped.description: Behavioral contract enforcement for LLM function calls — @contract decorator + versioned behavioral specs + drift detection
shipped.key_differentiator: The only pip-installable library that defines, versions, and enforces behavioral (not just structural) contracts on LLM function calls, with SQLite drift logging and CI gate.
shipped.bibleworld_pattern: PAT-035 (Acts 2:1-13 — Pentecost: many languages, one coherent message contract)
shipped.competitive_status: GREEN — confirmed no direct competitor across 4 live searches (March 2026). AgentSpec/AgentAssert are research papers not pip packages. Guardrails AI does output validation not versioned behavioral contracts.
shipped.next_step: Push to GitHub repo buildworld-ai/llm-contract, publish to PyPI, launch HN + Dev.to

revenue_status.note: Both tools are MIT OSS. Revenue path: enterprise support + hosted dashboard (v0.3+). Traction signals needed: 100 GitHub stars + 100 PyPI installs per tool.
revenue_status.law_2_trigger: If both tools under 100 installs after 3 weeks, pivot to GrantPilot (direct $29-499/month revenue, 2-3 week MVP).

currently_building.product: llm-contract v0.1.0 launch + prompt-lock v0.1.0 launch
currently_building.blocker: Needs PyPI account + GitHub repos created (manual step — outside build loop)
currently_building.next_step: 1) Create GitHub repos buildworld-ai/prompt-lock + buildworld-ai/llm-contract, 2) pip publish both to PyPI, 3) Show HN posts, 4) Dev.to tutorials

competitive_intelligence.llm_behavioral_contracts: GREEN — confirmed no direct pip-installable competitor (March 2026). AgentSpec is ICSE 2026 paper. AgentAssert/ABC is research. Guardrails AI = output validation only, no versioning, no drift.
competitive_intelligence.prompt_regression_testing: GREEN — prompt-lock still unoccupied as standalone pip package
competitive_intelligence.promptfoo_acquired_by_openai: March 16 2026 — validates space. Provider lock-in concern for existing users strengthens our positioning.
competitive_intelligence.promptlock_one_word: promptlock (no hyphen) published March 26 2026 — trivial YAML versioning, NO regression testing. Our prompt-lock (hyphenated) available on PyPI.
competitive_intelligence.grant_wizard: Africa NGO grant writing, ~$20/month, Africa-based NGO staff. Non-overlapping with GrantPilot diaspora segment.
competitive_intelligence.grant_writing_market: Crowded general market: FundRobin, Grantboost ($19.99-29.99), Instrumentl ($39-59). GrantPilot differentiates on post-USAID templates + diaspora + USD pricing.
competitive_intelligence.litellm_supply_chain_attack: LiteLLM 1.82.7-1.82.8 compromised March 24 2026. Avoid LiteLLM dependency in published packages.

llm_contract.judge_abstraction: Direct Anthropic + OpenAI SDKs (avoided LiteLLM due to supply chain attack March 2026)
llm_contract.storage: SQLite — zero dependencies, self-hosted, user owns data

shared.ci_publishing: OIDC trusted publishing via pypa/gh-action-pypi-publish — no stored API tokens
